steps.title: Write the equivalent ratios
steps.content:
The ratio $120$ to $m$ equals the ratio $3$ to $27$. Write that as a proportion.
$$\frac{120}{m}=\frac{3}{27}$$

steps.title: Solve the proportion
steps.content:
Simplify the right side, then solve for $m$.
$$\frac{120}{m}=\frac{1}{9}$$
$$120\cdot 9=m$$
$$m=1080$$
The answer is 1080.
